questionHtml: Outline a function of cholesterol in cell membranes.
markschemeHtml:
reduces fluidity of membrane / reduces permeability of membrane (to some molecules);

Accept ‘controls’ or ‘maintains ‘ as a BOD.

meta.title: Outline a function of cholesterol in cell membranes.
